disclaimer: Representative outcomes from early agency deployments. Names anonymized until customers approve public use — contact sales to become a reference account.

stories.quote: We stood up three talkgroups and had supervisors on Inrico handsets the same afternoon. Dispatch finally sees every unit on one map instead of chasing radio checks.
Emergency alerts hit dispatch with location immediately. Our officers use hardware PTT on rugged radios — it feels like our old system but works across the whole campus on cellular.
Per-site channels, free dispatcher seats, and searchable call history for client incident reports. The 3-day log window was enough to start; we added unlimited retention for investigations.
